data.title: St. Johns County Legislative Day on Feb. 5 in Tallahassee for an immersive experience, promoting culture and priorities.
data.description: An event at the Capitol Courtyard in Tallahassee on January 28, 2026, will offer an immersive experience showcasing the culture, people, and priorities of St. Johns County. Legislators are invited to participate, taking a moment to relax, enjoy the fresh air, and connect with the community. The event aims to highlight the essence of St. Johns County and foster meaningful interactions.

data.title: Inventor from Gravenhurst, ON creates NO MESS WARE for easier cooking with modified utensil.
data.description: On January 28, 2026 in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Gravenhurst, ON, Canada unveiled a new cooking utensil called the NO MESS WARE. This modified design allows users to secure the stirring spoon or fork onto a cooking pot or serving bowl effortlessly. The inventor created this innovative tool to make cooking and serving easier. This new utensil is set to revolutionize kitchen convenience.

data.title: CACI recognized as a Fortune Most Admired Company for the 9th consecutive year; 15th time overall. CEO expresses gratitude.
data.description: CACI International Inc (NYSE: CACI) from Reston, Virginia has been declared a Fortune World’s Most Admired Company for the ninth consecutive year, making it their 15th time on the list. John Mengucci, CACI's President and Chief Executive Officer, expressed gratitude for the recognition, attributing it to the company's emphasis on people, strategic planning, and commitment to national security goals. This marks a significant achievement in the company's history.

data.title: Fidelity plans to launch a stablecoin via approved trust bank, highlighting increased institutional adoption of blockchain payments.
data.description: Fidelity, a major financial institution, has announced its plans to release a stablecoin through a recently authorized national trust bank. This move highlights the increasing adoption of blockchain payment systems by institutional entities. This marks a significant development in the sector, as it showcases the growing utilization of digital currency in the financial realm by established organizations.

data.title: TON Price could hit $2.00-$2.40 by February 2026 after showing oversold conditions at $1.51. Analysts see a potential bounce.
data.description: Toncoin is currently priced at $1.51 and is indicating oversold conditions, with analysts projecting a potential increase to the range of $2.00 to $2.40 by February. Technical indicators are pointing towards a possible rebound from the current support levels.

data.title: Andre Murphy promoted to VP of Sports and Entertainment at Wiland™ to lead FanSignals growth and drive fan revenue with predictive intelligence.
data.description: Andre Murphy has recently been appointed as the Vice President of FanSignals, with the responsibility of overseeing the company's growth and increasing fan revenue through predictive intelligence. This move aims to boost business growth and enhance strategic decision-making.

data.title: Alcami promotes Guy Kubi to COO, effective immediately.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 28, 2026, in Durham, North Carolina, the prominent U.S. contract development and manufacturing organization, Alcami Corporation, revealed the promotion of Guy Kubi to the position of Chief Operating Officer (COO). The appointment is effective immediately and signifies a significant development within the company. This move highlights Alcami's commitment to enhancing its operations and further solidifying its position in the industry.

data.title: In 2026, Haushof Home Essentials presents solutions for resetting homes, focusing on decluttering and fresh starts.
data.description: In Huntersville, North Carolina, on January 28, 2026, residents are transitioning from the holiday season to the new year by focusing on decluttering and revitalizing their living spaces. Haushof Home Essentials is catering to this trend by offering products to help create a refreshed and purposeful home environment. Homeowners are seeking a fresh start by reimagining their living spaces, with an emphasis on organization and intentionality.

data.title: UCF research shows C-BATT's Obsidia™ swells less than graphite during lithiation, aiding in longer-lasting batteries.
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, new research presented at the 50th Annual International Convention and Expo on Advanced Energy Storage discusses a solution to material swelling in lithium-ion batteries during cycling. Dr. Akihiro Kushima from the University of Central Florida highlighted the potential of C-BATT’s Obsidia™ in meeting the rising global demand for affordable, long-lasting, high-capacity energy storage solutions. The technology aims to combat a common cause of battery failure. The study provides insights into addressing this issue, crucial as the market seeks more reliable energy storage options.

data.title: Technical analysis indicates neutral consolidation for SHIB as January ends. Expect possible resistance near $0.0000085, with mixed signals for February 2026.
data.description: According to a recent analysis, there is a possibility that Shiba Inu could reach resistance levels close to $0.0000085. However, as of February 2026, technical indicators are displaying a mixture of signals. The summary of the SHIB price prediction indicates that the current market situation is uncertain and subject to fluctuations.

data.title: Nonprofit R4I launches to support CA manufacturers in the absence of MEP, after 33 years.
data.description: In Redondo Beach, California, a new nonprofit organization called Roadmap 4 Innovation (R4I) has been launched as a 501(c)(3) entity. This organization aims to provide essential technical assistance, training, and business support to manufacturers and entrepreneurs in California. The state's Manufacturing Extension Partnership (MEP) Center had been a crucial resource for California manufacturers for 33 years, offering guidance in operations, compliance, and workforce development. R4I's establishment comes after the MEP Center's funding was discontinued, leaving a gap in services for manufacturers in the state. The organization's focus is on ensuring the continuity of support for California manufacturers and entrepreneurs in need.

data.title: Tarkett earns A Score on CDP climate rating for 2nd year, among top out of 20,000 companies.
data.description: A world-renowned company based in Solon, Ohio, Tarkett, known for its cutting-edge and eco-friendly flooring and sports surface products, has recently earned an impressive A Score in the CDP climate rating for the second consecutive year. This achievement signifies Tarkett as one of the leading performers out of a staggering 20,000 companies assessed.

data.title: InsuranceAUM.com announces 2026 Insurers’ Real Assets Forum in Philadelphia, catering to insurance investors in real estate and infrastructure.
data.description: Philadelphia-based company InsuranceAUM.com has recently revealed details about their upcoming 2026 Insurers' Real Assets Forum. This event serves as a key gathering for insurance investors interested in real estate and infrastructure. It provides a platform for participants to engage in discussions, network, and explore investment opportunities within these sectors. The forum is expected to draw a significant number of attendees, including professionals and experts from the insurance industry. This event highlights the growing interest in real assets among insurance companies and offers valuable insights for those looking to diversify their investment portfolios.

data.title: WLD Price Prediction: Currently at $0.46, expected to reach $0.62-$0.73 by February 2026 despite market conditions.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Worldcoin (WLD) is currently valued at $0.46 per token. Analysts predict that the price could reach between $0.62 and $0.73 by February 2026, despite the current downward trend and neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) levels.

data.title: Surf Internet secures new investment led by Macquarie Capital to expand fiber deployment, following $175M investment in Feb 2025.
data.description: A top fiber-optic internet provider, Surf Internet®, operating in Indiana, Illinois, and Michigan, has disclosed a significant investment backed by Macquarie Capital, Bain Capital, and Future Standard. Following the $175 million equity injection announced in February 2025 to enhance fiber deployment and improve high-speed internet access in underserved and rural areas, this new investment signifies the company's commitment to executing their expansion plans.
